news.title: Amazon adds 1-hour and 3-hour delivery options in the US
news.summary: Amazon Prime subscribers will be charged $9.99 for one-hour delivery and $4.99 for three-hour delivery. If you don't have a Prime subscription, you'll pay $19.99 for one-hour delivery and $14.99 for three-hour delivery.

news.title: Gecko Robotics lands the largest U.S. Navy robotics deal yet
news.summary: Gecko Robotics inked a five-year deal to help the U.S. Navy monitor and predict needed maintenance on its fleet of ships.

news.title: Picsart now allows creators to ‘hire’ AI assistants through agent marketplace
news.summary: Picsart's AI agent marketplace will launch with four agents, then add more agents each week.

news.title: SEC eyes shift to twice-yearly earnings reports
news.summary: The SEC is working on a proposal to allow public companies to release earnings reports twice a year instead of quarterly, per the WSJ.

news.title: Nvidia’s version of OpenClaw could solve its biggest problem: security
news.summary: Nvidia announced an open enterprise AI agent platform, called NemoClaw, that is built off of viral OpenClaw.

news.title: Oppo’s nearly creaseless foldable isn’t launching in Europe after all
news.summary: Oppo has launched its "zero-feel crease" foldable, the Find N6, but while we knew it was unlikely to launch in the US, it's a shame to discover that the promised "global" launch is also leaving Europe out in the cold. news.title: Samsung discontinues its Galaxy Z TriFold after just three months
news.summary: Samsung is preparing to axe its first three-panel foldable phone less than three months after launching the device in the US. news.title: Leaving civilization is now easier with this ‘off-grid utility core’
news.summary: Klumpen isn't an off-grid cabin, but it does provide all the utilities needed to live away from civilization comfortably. news.title: Hands on with Aqara’s new Matter-compatible camera
news.summary: The first Matter camera is here - sort of. Camera support came to the smart home standard last year, and Aqara's Camera Hub G350 is the first to support it. news.summary: After a chaotic week following the Justice Department's mid-trial settlement with Live Nation-Ticketmaster, the antitrust trial picked back up surprisingly smoothly on Monday - this time, with dozens of states leading the case. news.title: RFK Jr.’s anti-vaccine changes to CDC vaccine guidance blocked by judge
news.summary: Ruling temporarily blocks changes to vaccine recommendations and an advisory board.

news.title: Elon Musk's xAI sued for turning three girls' real photos into AI CSAM
news.summary: Discord user led cops to Grok-generated CSAM of real girls, lawsuit says.

news.title: National Academies of Sciences says no to demands it remove climate info
news.summary: State attorneys general won't get climate chapter removed from a legal manual.

news.title: New "vibe coded" AI translation tool splits the video game preservation community
news.summary: Creator apologizes after using Patreon funds for Gemini-powered magazine scan processor.

news.title: Trump and his FCC chair demand more positive news coverage of Iran war
news.summary: Carr makes evidence-free claim of "hoaxes and news distortions." Trump is thrilled.

news.title: Skylight’s Calendar 2 Review: Its Best Digital Calendar Yet
news.summary: Skylight’s popular digital calendar gets its Goldilocks size. But like with the Calendar Max before it, you have to prepare your family for a full conversion to keep it useful.

news.title: What Are Gravel Running Shoes? (2026)
news.summary: This new-ish hybrid between trail runners and road runners is designed for less technical terrain and the occasional road run.

news.title: How Invisalign Became the World’s Biggest User of 3D Printers
news.summary: Joe Hogan, Align Technology’s plastics-nerd CEO, says you shouldn’t eat with your aligners and that you don’t need to wear your retainers every night.

news.title: How to Set Up Your Own NAS Server for Backups and Content Streaming
news.summary: A home network-attached storage (NAS) server is ideal for backups, content streaming, and more. It could even save you money in the long run.

news.title: Sears Exposed AI Chatbot Phone Calls and Text Chats to Anyone on the Web
news.summary: Customer conversations with chatbots can include contact information and personal details that make it easier for scammers to launch phishing attacks and commit fraud.
